event_headline: Iran Deputy Parliament Speaker Threatens Nuclear Bomb Test Linked to Sharia Law

chronology.action: claims Iran prepared 500 intercontinental ballistic missiles (ICBMs) and warns U.S. territory would be targeted in response to a potential U.S. attack
states 'Our desire is NOT TO HURT the PEOPLE OF IRAN' and 'We have NO PROBLEM with the PEOPLE OF IRAN'
states live on television that a nuclear bomb test would occur 'IF THERE WERE NO ‘SHARIA OR FATWA’ TOMORROW'
asserts Trump's superior understanding of the Bible compared to Pope Leo and credits Trump for preventing Iran from acquiring a weapon
states he was an 'hour away from ordering an attack on Iran before postponing it'

key_actors.name: Iran's Deputy in Parliament
key_actors.stated_position: Threatened a nuclear bomb test, conditional on the absence of 'Sharia or Fatwa'.

key_actors.name: @IranReportsX
key_actors.role: Social media account reporting on Iran
key_actors.stated_position: Claims Iran has prepared 500 ICBMs and issued a warning that U.S. territory could be targeted.

key_actors.name: Marco Rubio
key_actors.stated_position: Expressed a desire 'NOT TO HURT the PEOPLE OF IRAN' and affirmed 'NO PROBLEM with the PEOPLE OF IRAN'.

key_actors.name: Pastor Jeffress
key_actors.stated_position: Credited Donald Trump with preventing Iran from acquiring a weapon that would 'destroy Israel & Middle East' and asserted Trump's superior understanding of the Bible.

key_actors.name: Donald Trump
key_actors.stated_position: Claimed he was an 'hour away from ordering an attack on Iran before postponing it'.

factual_claims.claim: Iran's Deputy in Parliament stated on live television: 'WE WOULD TEST A NUCLEAR BOMB IF THERE WERE NO ‘SHARIA OR FATWA’ TOMORROW.'
@IranReportsX claimed 'Iran has prepared 500 intercontinental ballistic missiles (ICBMs) in response to a potential U.S. attack,' adding a warning that 'U.S. territory will be targeted.'
Marco Rubio stated, 'Our desire is NOT TO HURT the PEOPLE OF IRAN' and 'We have NO PROBLEM with the PEOPLE OF IRAN'.
Pastor Jeffress asserted that 'Iran was WEEKS from weapon that would destroy Israel & Middle East' and that Trump had fulfilled a 'GOD-GIVEN RESPONSIBI' in preventing this.
Donald Trump stated he was 'an hour away from ordering an attack on Iran before postponing it'.

verified_facts.claim: @IranReportsX claimed 'Iran has prepared 500 intercontinental ballistic missiles (ICBMs) in response to a potential U.S. attack,' adding a warning that 'U.S. territory will be targeted.'
verified_facts.finding: The claim that Iran has prepared 500 intercontinental ballistic missiles (ICBMs) in response to a potential U.S. attack and warned that U.S. territory will be targeted is not supported by current intelligence assessments. Experts state that Iran does not possess operational ICBMs capable of reliably reaching the United States. While Iran has a large arsenal of short- and medium-range ballistic missiles, and its space program could contribute to future ICBM development, there is no credible evidence to suggest it currently has 500 ICBMs ready for deployment.

verified_facts.claim: Pastor Jeffress asserted that 'Iran was WEEKS from weapon that would destroy Israel & Middle East' and that Trump had fulfilled a 'GOD-GIVEN RESPONSIBI' in preventing this.

disputed_claims.competing_accounts: The source material presents this as a claim by @IranReportsX; no direct competing accounts are provided within the given text, implying it requires external verification.

disputed_claims.competing_accounts: The source material presents this as a statement by Donald Trump; no direct competing accounts are provided within the given text, implying the context or veracity of the statement may be subject to debate.

competing_frames.frame: Iran's Nuclear Intentions Tied to Religious Doctrine
competing_frames.summary: Iran's potential development or testing of nuclear weapons is directly conditional on or influenced by religious edicts (Sharia/Fatwa).

competing_frames.frame: Iran as a General Military Threat
competing_frames.proponents: @IranReportsX (J1), Pastor Jeffress (J22, J23, J24), Donald Trump (Feed excerpt - Reuters)
competing_frames.summary: Iran possesses or seeks to acquire significant military capabilities, including intercontinental ballistic missiles or nuclear weapons, posing a threat to other nations.

competing_frames.frame: US Policy Differentiating Between Iranian Regime and People
competing_frames.summary: US foreign policy aims to distinguish between the actions of the Iranian regime and the welfare of the Iranian populace, indicating no hostile intent towards the latter.
